title: Herbal Zest Chicken
description: A light and herbal Syrian dish featuring chicken breast with a hint of mint and lemon to aid in hangover recovery, suitable for nut-free diets.
instructions: Cut chicken into serving pieces and season with black pepper.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat, add chicken and cook until golden brown on both sides, about 4-5 minutes per side.
Add mint, parsley, and lemon zest to the skillet; toss gently to coat chicken evenly.
Transfer cooked chicken to a baking dish. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
Serve hot as a light Syrian-style snack.
